summary.problem: Xbox Play PWA stuck on splash screen in Edge but works in Brave
summary.likely_cause: JavaScript infinite loop or tight polling loop based on high CPU and futex pattern
summary.comparison: Brave instance shows "Play Xbox - Play Xbox" title, Edge shows only "msedge" (splash)
recommendations: Page is stuck in initialization/authentication loop
May be related to PWA cache or storage permissions
Edge and Brave handle PWA differently - possibly manifest or feature detection issue
